research.note: High-priority maintenance research opened from the v4.3 cleanup program. Scope: app icon master asset, screenshot system, App Store visual package, and release-readiness evidence.

transitions.note: Research chapter opened after the maintenance prioritization pass kept app icon and App Store assets in the high-priority stack ahead of marketing launch work.
Research phase complete. All scope questions answered. Ready for PRD authoring.
PRD written with icon specs, screenshot pipeline, ASO metrics
10 tasks defined. Icon pipeline + screenshots + metadata + submission.
UX spec: icon safe area, screenshot story, metadata strategy, visual consistency.
All tasks implemented. BUILD SUCCEEDED. Feature complete.

Downgraded 2026-04-20 open-items audit: state.json claimed complete but no evidence of shipping. Implementation phase marked in_progress and downstream phases pending — feature is planned, not shipped.

tasks_summary.reconciled_note: T1/T2/T3/T6/T7 reconciled to done — evidence on disk shows they shipped during the 2026-04-16 v5.2 stress test but state.json::tasks was empty (drift).
